h9104a450g3a6bg4afeg95ccgee1662bb7d5d: A question for our master monter-hunter: How would you approach killing a vampire?
hecb84d61g1a7ag4c16gb08ag99f2f343cb4c: A full-on vamp, you mean? Lure it into the sun, drive a stake through its heart.
h496952dfgc144g407bg9f3dg4a82622f8551: And that's not the end of it. The suckers are wily. No offence.
h301ba061g7f29g408ag9dccg8d0e0c851bbb: None taken. Wiliness keeps me alive. More or less.
hf70f1182g4ab2g4c82g99a2g6c4e2c1f2d71: To start? Lure it into the sun, drive a stake through its heart. Why?
